scope: In-app browser traversal of /agent against no-provider API 4170 and Web 3160, with live LLM provider credentials unset for the server process.
secretsPolicy: No provider keys were supplied to this server process. No cookies or credentials are stored in this evidence.
steps: Started API 4170 with live LLM provider credentials unset and web 3160 pointed at that API.
Observed visible degraded banner: Демо-режим / LLM-ключ не настроен / provider mock-llm.
Submitted a prompt that asked the agent to create a task.
Observed degraded assistant response telling that LLM provider is not configured.
Verified no review drawer and no Применить выбранное control appeared after submit.
expected: Without a configured provider, the browser UI must clearly show degraded/no-provider state and must not present fake review/apply controls.
actual: Pass: warning banner and no-provider assistant response were visible; reviewTextPresent=false and applyPresent=false after submit.
evidence: Browser text contained Демо-режим and LLM-ключ не настроен (провайдер mock-llm).
Post-submit browser state had reviewTextPresent=false and applyPresent=false.

coverageImpact.RISK-AGENT-REAL-LLM-SSE: Completes the degraded no-provider browser side of the agent risk. Combined with live OpenRouter SSE/browser apply/readback, non-create mutation, generic CRM/comms redispatch, and per-role tools evidence, the core risk is covered for available providers.

unverifiedProviderMatrix: Anthropic provider browser/live variant not checked because no Anthropic provider key was provided in this run.
